name: ecopark-bicycle-parking
description: GCP-ready fullstack platform for Ecopark Bicycle Parking requirements analysis.

scripts.check: node --check public/app.js public/scene.js server/app.js server/db.js test/app.test.js scripts/ui-smoke.js scripts/uc-flow-smoke.js scripts/capture-uc001-screenshots.js
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run test:coverage && npm run smoke:ui && npm run smoke:uc
